intent: Layered wall occlusion height fix: low walls occlude only their projected span, not taller walls/sprites/rain above them.
technical_notes: Added WallLayerBufferV227 and WallOcclusionRangesV227 per screen column.
Wallcasting collects limited multi-hit layers and draws higher far wall portions above lower front walls.
Sprite strips use vertical span clipping against wall layers instead of full ZBuffer rejection.
Rain checks ceiling/indoor first, then wall layer spans; z>1 shortcut is no longer the authority.
Airspace rain is allowed only over outdoor low/hedge walls, not modern building walls or covered cells.
visual_tests_required: low wall in front of high wall
rain above hedges but not inside reception/bath
